# Proposed Change
Briefly describe the contribution. If it resolves an issue or feature request, be sure to link to that issue.

# Checklist
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how to set up and run these locally.

- [ ] Tests pass (add new tests if applicable)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`uv run pre-commit run --all-files`)

# Further Comments
If this is a relatively large or complex change, kick off the discussion by explaining why you chose the solution you did and what alternatives you considered, etc...
